ground_truth.title: OnePlus 13
ground_truth.main_content:
Snapdragon® 8 Elite for flagship power made smarter

Industry-leading IP69/IP68 water resistance with Aqua Touch 2.0

All-new, ultra-slim OnePlus Silicon NanoStack battery

OnePlus now offers 4K Dolby Vision for cinematic capture with every camera

Premium statement design meets enhanced durability

Speed meets AI with AI-powered OxygenOS 15

Our best Snapshot photography with Clear Burst

Hasselblad Camera for Mobile for studio-grade portraits

Extreme Performance that endures

The new Snapdragon® 8 Elite Mobile Platform is the heart that powers the mind of OnePlus AI. With a faster Neural Engine, an improved CPU and GPU, and a big jump in memory bandwidth, your gaming, entertainment, and digital life has never been faster or smoother.

All-new AI Engine delivers a faster, more stable, and smarter experience

40% higher Adreno GPU performance 1

delivers immersive gaming

45% better performance 1

with next-gen 8-core Oryon™ CPU

27% more efficient performance 1

for longer battery life

Learn more about performance

Always ready in all-weather

Rated at both IP69 and IP68 2 , the design is forward-looking and future-proof. Experience the industry's highest levels of water and dust resistance wherever your journey takes you.

Protected with the latest Ceramic Guard, rated 2 times 3 tougher than standard smartphone glass, enjoy peace of mind with higher drop and scratch resistance.

Ultra-slim OnePlus Silicon NanoStack Battery

All-new, ultra-slim design overflows with power. Delivered by the latest in cutting-edge lithium-silicon technology.

Amp up your power with 80W SUPERVOOC and 50W AIRVOOC charging.

Ultra-High Energy Density

Smaller body than OnePlus 12

* Up to 100W with OnePlus SUPERVOOC 100W Dual Ports Power Adapter

Witness the all-new, record-breaking 2K ProXDR Display. Achieving an industry-first DisplayMate A++ rating and rated the Best Smartphone Display, swipe into over 20 display performance records 8 . Open your eyes to a new level of color accuracy, brightness and color depth.

SGS Screen reliability: 5 stars

Glide without limits

From rain to being in the shower to oily fingers, next-gen Aqua Touch 2.0 ensures every swipe flows smoothly. Together with the all-new Glove Mode, tap into unparalleled display responsiveness - indoors and out 7 .

Learn more about display

Make moments magical

Capture timeless moments with cutting-edge snapshot technology. Elevate them with Clear Burst, dual exposure and Action Mode. It's never been easier to snap crystal-clear images of blazing-fast cars, feisty pets, and even action sports.

Learn more about Snapshot

Photo comparison with flagship competitor devices. The difference is clear with OnePlus 13.

* Product Imagery and photography are illustrative only and are not screencaptures directly taken from the product. Please refer to the actual product experience.

Hasselblad perfection in your pocket

5th-gen Hasselblad Camera for Mobile combines a flagship 50MP triple camera system, Portrait Mode and Master Mode for effortlessly iconic photography. Recreate the unique essence of Hasselblad in every shot.

50MP Sony's LYT-808 with OIS

1/1.4'' sensor size, F1.6 aperture

3X Triprism Telephoto

1/1.95'' sensor size, 73mm focal length

120° Fov, 1/2.75'' sensor size

Sensational studio-grade portraits

Simulates optical standards

XCD 3,5/30 lens at 1X zoom

XCD 2,8/65 lens at 2X zoom

XCD 2,5/90V lens at 3X zoom

Every moment is a masterclass

The upgraded Master Mode delivers authentic Hasselblad photography for moments that resonate.

All-around epic 4K Dolby, all the time

OnePlus 13 is the first OnePlus phone to capture 4K Dolby Vision video with every camera, including front and rear. Recreate treasured moments with family and friends, or transform videos to cinematic quality with Hollywood-grade technology. An innovative 4-MIC system ensures sensational studio-quality sound, with all-new directional Truepoint Audio creating an immersive soundscape.

Bring photos to life with Livephoto

Record a moment, pick your favorite frame, and replay the magic for the most share-worthy memories.

Experience the power of all-new OnePlus AI. Search smarter, crank up your creativity, and power your productivity for a smoother digital life.

Intelligent Search 9

OnePlus AI intelligently understands information from on-device files and notes. Power your search using conversational, human-like prompts 10 .

How much do I need to pay for video production?

What should I bring for my trip to Melbourne?

Circle to Search with Google is coming to OxygenOS. Circle, highlight, scribble, or tap any image, video, or text – to search without switching apps.

Meet Gemini, your AI assistant from Google. Chat with Gemini to supercharge your ideas, and to help you write, plan and learn more.

Scan and save your boarding pass in Google Wallet for faster, smoother travel.

Customize your writing with instant style suggestions in Google Messages.

Tired of pixelated photos after cropping? OxygenOS keeps your photos sharp, even when you zoom in on the smallest details.

From people to pets, enjoy pixel-perfect portraits filled with more natural features and textures.

AI Reflection Eraser

One tap takes care of glare. Remove reflection for shots that sparkle.

Open up to Open Canvas

Fluid Cloud Coming to More Apps

Arriving on our non-foldable flagship phones, the acclaimed Open Canvas opens up limitless possibilities.

Fast and smooth wireless file sharing at your fingertips.

Now with real-time update support for more apps 15 .

Fast and smooth made smarter

Our lightest ever OS

Seamless multitasking

Learn more about OxygenOS 15

Your OnePlus 13 Our stunning new look

Unrivaled comfort meets sophistication with exquisite micro-fiber vegan leather. The rich dark blue hues evoke pure tranquility, whispering of nature's elemental power and durability for luxury that lasts.

Next-generation silk glass echoes the sublime purity of the Arctic landscape painted by the winter sun. Filled with glacial elegance, every swipe is cool to the touch, leaving no fingerprints to retain its primordial beauty.

Inspired by the striking beauty of dark wood, explore the depths of luxury across the textured grain details. Meticulously crafted with precision to complement every style, the design is a bold statement of refined taste.

Click and rotate to explore OnePlus 13

Comfort that captivates

A quad-curved design and flat mid-frame blend to create an ultra-light body. Elegant ergonomics deliver a design crafted for luxurious comfort in any orientation.

Effortlessly connected

We've covered every angle with omni-directional antennas and Smart Link, so you enjoy faster, smoother and more stable connectivity.

Learn more about communications technology

Security. That's OnePlus

Better security with Google

ODAD, Theft Protection, Safety Center

Protect your privacy with Clear Voice

FindMyDevice now works even when the phone is off

1. https://www.qualcomm.com/products/mobile/snapdragon/smartphones/snapdragon-8-series-mobile-platforms/snapdragon-8-elite-mobile-platform

https://www.qualcomm.com/products/mobile/snapdragon/smartphones/snapdragon-8-series-mobile-platforms/snapdragon-8-elite-mobile-platform

2. The OnePlus 13 is water and dust resistant under normal usage conditions. In controlled laboratory settings, it has been tested to comply with IEC60529 standards, achieving IP69 and IP68 ratings. The IPX9 water resistance test conditions are as follows: ① Turntable speed: (5±1) r/min; ② Spray angles: 0°, 30°, 60°, and 90°; ③ Flow rate: (15±1) L/min; ④ Water temperature: (80±5)℃; ⑤ Test duration: 30s per angle; ⑥ Phone placement: horizontally, with the screen facing up. The IPX8 water resistance test conditions are: ① Still freshwater, 1.5 meters deep; ② Test duration: 30 minutes; ③ Water temperature difference with the product not exceeding 5°C. Please do not charge the phone while it is wet. The scenarios in daily life differ from laboratory conditions, so do not immerse the phone in water, or let it come into contact with seawater or other liquids like beverages during everyday use. After exposure to rain, submersion, or splashing, liquid may block the microphone, earpiece, or speaker openings, causing audio issues during calls or playback. Its functionality can be restored by shaking off the water and allowing it to air dry. The water and dust resistance capability might decrease due to wear and tear from daily use. Damage caused by immersion in liquids is not covered by the warranty.

The OnePlus 13 is water and dust resistant under normal usage conditions. In controlled laboratory settings, it has been tested to comply with IEC60529 standards, achieving IP69 and IP68 ratings. The IPX9 water resistance test conditions are as follows: ① Turntable speed: (5±1) r/min; ② Spray angles: 0°, 30°, 60°, and 90°; ③ Flow rate: (15±1) L/min; ④ Water temperature: (80±5)℃; ⑤ Test duration: 30s per angle; ⑥ Phone placement: horizontally, with the screen facing up. The IPX8 water resistance test conditions are: ① Still freshwater, 1.5 meters deep; ② Test duration: 30 minutes; ③ Water temperature difference with the product not exceeding 5°C. Please do not charge the phone while it is wet. The scenarios in daily life differ from laboratory conditions, so do not immerse the phone in water, or let it come into contact with seawater or other liquids like beverages during everyday use. After exposure to rain, submersion, or splashing, liquid may block the microphone, earpiece, or speaker openings, causing audio issues during calls or playback. Its functionality can be restored by shaking off the water and allowing it to air dry. The water and dust resistance capability might decrease due to wear and tear from daily use. Damage caused by immersion in liquids is not covered by the warranty.

7. Turn on the Glove Mode before using this feature. Supports gloves with a material thickness of no more than 5mm, such as cotton, wool, and sheepskin gloves. When using, touch and slide the screen with your fingertips, and try to avoid having large gaps between the gloves and your fingers to prevent the screen from failing to recognize finger actions. If you are using thicker gloves or if there are gaps between your fingertips and the gloves, the screen may not be able to detect your finger movements.

Turn on the Glove Mode before using this feature. Supports gloves with a material thickness of no more than 5mm, such as cotton, wool, and sheepskin gloves. When using, touch and slide the screen with your fingertips, and try to avoid having large gaps between the gloves and your fingers to prevent the screen from failing to recognize finger actions. If you are using thicker gloves or if there are gaps between your fingertips and the gloves, the screen may not be able to detect your finger movements.

This feature is exclusive to OnePlus 13 and OnePlus 13R. Support may be expanded to additional devices in the future.

10. Exclusive to English language at launch. Support for additional languages may be provided in future updates. Intelligent Search can search through the first 1,000 files and notes saved on-device. The search process will be performed on the first 30,000 characters in each file or note.

Exclusive to English language at launch. Support for additional languages may be provided in future updates. Intelligent Search can search through the first 1,000 files and notes saved on-device. The search process will be performed on the first 30,000 characters in each file or note.
